parameters.query:
SELECT
  '{{ String($json.question || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS question,
  '{{ String($json.pathname || '/').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS pathname,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.history || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb AS history,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'navigations', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(n) - 'id' - 'created_at' - 'updated_at' ORDER BY n.sort_order) FROM public.navigations n), '[]'::jsonb),
    'screens', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(s) - 'id' - 'created_at' - 'updated_at' ORDER BY s.sort_order) FROM public.screens s), '[]'::jsonb),
    'controls', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(c) - 'id' - 'created_at' - 'updated_at' ORDER BY c.sort_order) FROM public.controls c), '[]'::jsonb),
    'assistant_playbook', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(p) - 'id' - 'created_at' - 'updated_at' ORDER BY p.sort_order) FROM public.assistant_playbook p), '[]'::jsonb)
  ) AS context;

parameters.toolDescription: pwise_api: fetch the signed-in user's own data from the pwise REST API. Read-only GET. Give the full API path starting with /api/, e.g. /api/auth/me, /api/orders, /api/products?search=mug. The response is JSON ({ success, data }). Any non-GET or other user's data is rejected by the server.

values.name: path
values.description: The pwise API path to GET, starting with /api/ (query string allowed). Example: /api/auth/me
